scripts.develop: concurrently "nodemon server/server.mjs" "cd client-swoggerslol && npm run develop"
scripts.install: cd server && npm i && cd ../client-swoggerslol && npm i && cd ../client-deadlab && npm i
scripts.build: cd client-swoggerslol && npm run build && cd ../client-deadlab && npm run build
scripts.docker-rebuild: docker compose down && docker compose build && docker compose up -d
